name: Slink
description: A powerful, privacy-first image sharing platform
compose:
name: slashnode-slink
services:
  web:
    image: anirdev/slink:v1.12.1
    container_name: slink
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      TZ: UTC
      ORIGIN: http://${node.exports.host}:8811
      REQUIRE_SSL: 'false'
      USER_APPROVAL_REQUIRED: 'false'
      USER_PASSWORD_MIN_LENGTH: '8'
      USER_PASSWORD_REQUIREMENTS: '15'
      IMAGE_MAX_SIZE: 15M
      IMAGE_STRIP_EXIF_METADATA: 'true'
      IMAGE_COMPRESSION_QUALITY: '80'
      STORAGE_PROVIDER: local
    volumes:
      - web_data-var:/app/var/data
      - web_data-images:/app/slink/images
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8811:3000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data-var:
    name: slashnode-slink_web_data-var
  web_data-images:
    name: slashnode-slink_web_data-images
